chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P. No.D-4947 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Priority 1. For hearing of Misc. No.21993 of 2024 [Stay Application] 2. For hearing of main case 31.10.2024 Mr. Muhammad Ishaque, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Shah Hussain, Deputy Attorney General, Pakistan Sardar Zafar Hussain, Advocate for Respondents 1 and 3 ************ In response to the order passed by this Court on 23.10.2024, a statement has been filed on behalf of Respondent No.3, whereby, the impugned orders for re-opening the earlier Order-in-Original and the hearing notice thereafter have been withdrawn and the Order-in-Original has been restored. The statement is taken on record. The purpose of filing of this petition has been served; hence, the same stands disposed of along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Qurban/PA*
